channel.title: Canadian Health Monitor
channel.description: Weekly Canadian EMR, EHR, digital health, privacy, cybersecurity, CIHI, Infoway, and regulatory updates.

item.title: Weekly Canadian Health Monitor Digest - 2026-06-25
item.description:
Top updates
- Headed to the ER? Here's why you could now wait more than 48 hours to be admitted Source: CBC Health Published: Thu, 25 Jun 2026 04:00:00 EDT Matched keywords: health information Link: https://www.cbc.ca/news/health/hospital-patients-waiting-48-hours-for-admission-9.7248089?cmp=rss
- Canada's AI strategy aims to make health data more accessible. How will it protect privacy? Source: CBC Health Published: Wed, 24 Jun 2026 04:00:00 EDT Matched keywords: health data Link: https://www.cbc.ca/news/health/vital-health-data-privacy-9.7245577?cmp=rss
